nodes.label: 澳洲日常服务场景
nodes.description: 咖啡店、超市、柜台等高频服务场景里，用于开场、提出请求、付款、退换货和礼貌回应的表达。

nodes.label: 服务场景寒暄
nodes.description: 常用：How ya going? / How's it going? / Yeah, not too bad. Yourself? 说明：澳洲服务场景开头经常先轻松寒暄，不要把“你呢”翻译成 are you。

nodes.label: 点单和提出请求
nodes.description: 常用：What can I get for ya? / Can I get a medium oat latte, please? / Any sugar? / No thanks. 说明：点单用 Can I get... 很自然，不需要说 a cup of latte。

nodes.label: 堂食、外带和付款
nodes.description: 常用：For here or takeaway? / Takeaway, please. / That’ll be six fifty. / Can I pay by card? 说明：澳洲常用 takeaway，不用 take out；$6.50 读作 six fifty。

nodes.label: 退货、换货和商品故障
nodes.description: 常用：I'd like to return this item. / I realised it was faulty. / Do you have a receipt? / We can give you a refund or exchange it for a new one. / I'll take a replacement, please. 说明：退货说 return this item，不说 refund this good；faulty 是退货场景高频词。

nodes.label: 礼貌等待和回应
nodes.description: 常用：No worries. / Just give me a moment. / Just a sec. / Yep, here it is. 说明：No worries 是澳洲高频表达，可表示不用谢、没问题、当然可以。

nodes.label: 澳洲生活落地场景
nodes.description: 租房、银行、健身房等刚到澳洲后常见行政/生活办理场景的高频表达。

nodes.label: 租房看房和预约
nodes.description: 常用：I'm here for the inspection. / Have you booked an inspection? / I booked the 2 pm inspection. 说明：澳洲租房看房常说 inspection，不要直译 visiting the house。

nodes.label: 房型、家具和费用
nodes.description: 常用：This is a two-bedroom apartment. / Most of the furniture is included. / Are utilities included in the rent? / You'll need to set up your own internet. 说明：furniture 不可数；网络说 internet，不说 network。

nodes.label: 银行开户和账户类型
nodes.description: 常用：I'd like to open a bank account. / Do you currently have an Australian address? / Is an electronic visa okay? / Would you like a savings account or a transaction account? / Just a transaction account for now. / within a few business days. 说明：savings account 要带 s；transaction account 是澳洲日常消费账户。

nodes.label: 健身房会员和体验
nodes.description: 常用：I'd like to ask about your membership plans. / We offer both monthly and yearly memberships. / Do you offer a free trial? / What time does the gym usually close? / I'll give it a try today. 说明：健身房说 membership，不说 VIP plans；体验说 give it a try 很自然。

nodes.label: 澳洲办公室闲聊
nodes.description: 同事之间轻量聊天时使用的澳洲口语表达，适合午饭、咖啡、饮食偏好、项目忙碌程度和加班话题。

nodes.label: 午饭和咖啡闲聊
nodes.description: 常用：Any lunch plans today? / I might just grab something quick. / A new Thai place just opened downstairs. / Keen to try it? / I also wanna grab a coffee while we're there. 说明：grab lunch / grab a coffee / keen to... 都很澳洲、很办公室口语。

nodes.label: 饮食偏好和口味限制
nodes.description: 常用：I'm not really into spicy food. / They’ve got non-spicy options too. / They also have mild dishes. 说明：不要说 I cannot eat too spicy；表达“不太吃辣”可以用 not really into spicy food。

nodes.label: 忙碌、项目赶和加班
nodes.description: 常用：Have you been working overtime lately? / We've been pretty flat out lately. / The project’s been pretty hectic lately. / I've been pretty slammed this week. 说明：flat out 是澳洲高频忙碌表达；overtime 不加连字符。

nodes.label: 工程团队日常协作
nodes.description: 开发团队中确认任务、同步进度、澄清 API/权限逻辑、讨论上线和测试时的表达。

nodes.label: 任务进度和站会汇报
nodes.description: 常用：Do you think you can finish this feature today? / I should be able to. / What did you work on yesterday? / I finished refactoring the login module yesterday. / How's it going? 说明：I should be able to 比 It could be 自然；work on 比 mainly do 更像团队表达。

nodes.label: API、权限和需求确认
nodes.description: 常用：I still need to check a few things with the API. / Which part is unclear? / The user permission logic is still a bit unclear. / Maybe sync with the PM this afternoon. / I'll continue working on it once I've clarified that part. 说明：confirm an API 不自然，通常说 check API details / clarify requirements。

nodes.label: 上线、旧代码和测试覆盖
nodes.description: 常用：Overall it's been pretty smooth. / I found a few issues in the legacy code. / Will this affect this week's release? / I'll add more test coverage today. / I'll keep working on the fixes today. 说明：上线计划多用 release；补测试可说 add more test coverage。

nodes.label: Code Review 与架构讨论
nodes.description: 围绕 PR、service/controller 职责、性能、抽象、重构和可维护性进行技术讨论时的表达。

nodes.label: PR Review 反馈
nodes.description: 常用：I just had a look at your PR. / Anything I should fix? / Overall it looks good. / There are still a few areas we could improve. 说明：had a look at 更口语；areas we could improve 比 points could be optimized 更自然。

nodes.label: 性能、职责和业务逻辑
nodes.description: 常用：Is it a performance issue? / This service has too many responsibilities. / This service is handling too much logic. / There seems to be too much business logic in the controller. 说明：business logic 不可数；service has 注意第三人称单数。

nodes.label: 架构重构和可维护性
nodes.description: 常用：There's one thing I'm a bit concerned about. / I was trying to ship it quickly. / It could cause maintainability issues later. / Should we move it into the service layer? / Should we extract this into a separate service? / Some of the logic could be abstracted further. / I'll clean this part up later. 说明：move into / extract into 比 separate to 更准确；clean up 是开发团队高频。

nodes.label: 敏捷计划与需求变更
nodes.description: Sprint planning、需求变更、风险评估、影响范围、时间线和客户期望相关表达。

nodes.label: 任务估算和前提条件
nodes.description: 常用：How long do you think this will take? / What's your estimate for this task? / Assuming there are no API changes, it should take around two days. / I'll update the estimate later. / I'll estimate the effort first. 说明：不要说 how long can you finish；估算工作量常用 effort。

nodes.label: 风险、依赖和测试阶段问题
nodes.description: 常用：Any risks? / Any blockers? / The legacy system uses inconsistent data formats. / Should we sync with the backend team first? / Otherwise we might run into issues during testing. 说明：blocker 是阻塞点；run into issues during testing 比 causing issues under the testing phase 自然。

nodes.label: 需求变更和影响范围
nodes.description: 常用：The client just brought up a new requirement. / Is it a minor change, or will it affect the current logic? / They want us to support role-based access control. / We might need to adjust the current data structure. / The frontend team will probably need to make quite a few changes as well. / I'll assess the impact scope first. 说明：role-based access control 可简称 RBAC；impact scope 比 influence range 正确。

nodes.label: 上线时间线和客户期望
nodes.description: 常用：Is there a timeline for this requirement? / Do we have a target release date? / The client wants this done as soon as possible. / Let's put this into the current sprint for now. 说明：timeline 比 deadline 更适合问计划；for now 表示暂时这样安排。

nodes.label: 英语表达常见纠错
nodes.description: 将练习中反复出现的中式表达、搭配错误、可数/不可数和介词问题归纳成可回顾的纠错节点。

nodes.label: 高频词汇搭配纠错
nodes.description: 纠错：不要把“另外”翻译成 otherwise，otherwise 是“否则/不然”；“网络”在生活场景说 internet，不说 network；健身房说 membership，不说 VIP plans；上线计划多说 release，不一定说 deployment。

nodes.label: 常见语法和可数性
nodes.description: 纠错：business logic 不可数，要说 too much business logic；furniture 不可数，不说 furnitures；savings account 要带 s；service has 注意第三人称单数；does 后用动词原形 have。

nodes.label: 中文直译替换
nodes.description: 纠错：不要说 How long can you finish this task，改为 How long do you think this will take；不要说 refund this good，改为 return this item；不要说 influence range，改为 impact scope / affected areas；不要说 separate to the service layer，改为 move into / extract into the service layer。
